              100 S Charles Richard Beall Blvd

Non-Refundable Partial Payment Agreement

          


          
          
Date: 


          
          
I, , hereinafter referred to as "Buyer," agree to pay the amount of $______ as a NON-REFUNDABLE PARTIAL PAYMENT toward the purchase of a vehicle including, but not limited to, a motorcycle, scooter, or ATV, acknowledging the representation to be accurate, to the Buyer by Premier Auto Group LLC dba Car Factory, hereinafter known as "Seller," owner of said vehicle.


          
          

            
Vehicle

            

          


          


          
Buyer understands, acknowledges, and agrees that if he/she fails to pay the Seller the remaining amount due, when it is due, for the purchase of said vehicle, the non-refundable partial payment shall be forfeited.


          
Buyer understands and agrees never to dispute representation of said vehicle, parts, or accessories, sold AS IS, without any kind of warranty. Seller may, at his sole discretion, issue a credit not exceeding the partial payment amount, to be applied when making a future vehicle purchase from Premier Auto Group LLC dba Car Factory.


          
          

            

              
Seller (Authorized Principal)

              

              
Print Name

              

              
Signature

              

              
Date

Signature

Premier Auto Group dba

            
Car Factory

            

          

          

             will be referred to as “dealer”
          

          

             (Vin# ) will be referred to as “vehicle”
          

          

            I relinquish all rights to the “vehicle”, and am voluntarily surrendering it back to the “dealer”. All paperwork received from the “dealer” that is associated with the “vehicle” is now void. Further, I give permission to the “dealer” to void any ownership of the “vehicle” with the Florida Department of Motor Vehicles.
          

          

            
Sign

            
Date

          

          

            

            
Print

          

        

      


      
      

        

          

            
Surrender of Vehicle

            
In Full Satisfaction of Debt

          

          

            

              Year

              Make/Model

              Identification Number

            

            

              Account No.

              Dealer Name
CAR FACTORY

            

          

          

            TO: Car Factory (Secured Party)
          

          

            I/WE, , being in default in the payment of my/our obligations to the above named secured party, hereby consent(s) to the secured party’s acceptance of the vehicle in full satisfaction of my/our obligation to the secured party. I/We specifically acknowledge that this consent is given after the secured party obtained possession of my/our vehicle either through repossession or my/our voluntary surrender of the vehicle to the secured party. I/We furthermore acknowledge that the secured party shall have no obligation to account to me/us for any surplus, if any, obtained upon disposition of the collateral. To the extent permissible under applicable law, I/we hereby expressly waive any rights which I/we may have accruing to me/us under the Uniform Commercial Code, as adopted by the state, including, but not limited to, a specific waiver of any mandatory disposition of the vehicle. I/We furthermore expressly represent that by execution of this instrument, I/we have removed and retained all of my/our personal items from said vehicle and I/we release secured party from any liability for any property in the vehicle after the execution of this notice. To the extent any portion of this agreement shall be prohibited by, invalid or or unenforceable under applicable law, such portion shall be severed and ineffective, and the remainder of this Agreement shall not be affected and shall continue to be in full force and effect.
          

          

            Dated this day of , 20 at 
          

          

            
Witness 

            

Customer

          

          

            
Witness
